name: OneMedNet Corp
summary: PART I Company Overview OneMedNet is a global provider of clinical imaging innovation and curator of regulatory-grade Imaging Real World Data (iRWDTM). OneMedNets innovative solutions connect healthcare providers and patients satisfying a crucial need within the life sciences field offering direct access to clinical images and the associated contextual patient record.
